title: Gooey Energizing Syrian Shrimp Dumplings
description: A sour, gooey, energizing Syrian dish featuring shrimp paste and tempering-chocolate. Suitable for macrobiotic-friendly diets.
instructions: Mix rice flour and shrimp paste in a bowl until well combined.
Add water to the bowl and knead the dough for 10 minutes.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Roll each ball into a thin circle, about 10 cm in diameter.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook the dumplings for 2 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Add shredded tempering-chocolate to the pan and stir to melt.
Cook for an additional 1 minute, until the chocolate is gooey and the dumplings are coated.
Serve hot, garnished with yogurt if desired.
Optional: chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes to help the dumplings hold their shape better.
